description_long: This is a compact, modern desk lamp with a geometric, polygonal base and a cylindrical lampshade that tapers slightly toward the front. The lamp features a single, slightly curved support stem connecting the base to the shade, giving it a contemporary and minimalist appearance. The lampshade is solid and opaque, with a visible bulb socket at the rear and a recessed light opening at the front. The entire lamp is finished in a matte black color, contributing to its sleek and understated look. The base is wide and stable, designed to sit securely on flat surfaces such as desks or tables. There are no visible decorative embellishments, emphasizing function and simplicity in its design.
description: A modern, matte black desk lamp with a polygonal base, curved stem, and cylindrical shade, designed for functional and minimalist lighting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open face of the lampshade and the polygonal base directly below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved stem and the cylindrical shape of the shade, with the rear bulb socket visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the lampshade and the central support stem, with the bulb socket clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the curved stem and the side profile of the shade.
